mapper.insert: INSERT INTO draft_analysis( draft_id, matchup_score, matchup_detail, synergy_score, synergy_detail, team_synergy_score, team_synergy_detail, ally_destructive_score, enemy_destructive_score, final_score, recommendation, win_probability, create_time, analysis_time ) VALUES ( #{draftId}, #{matchupScore}, #{matchupDetail}, #{synergyScore}, #{synergyDetail}, #{teamSynergyScore}, #{teamSynergyDetail}, #{allyDestructiveScore}, #{enemyDestructiveScore}, #{finalScore}, #{recommendation}, #{winProbability}, #{createTime}, #{analysisTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE draft_analysis SET matchup_score=#{matchupScore}, synergy_score=#{synergyScore}, team_synergy_score=#{teamSynergyScore}, final_score=#{finalScore}, recommendation=#{recommendation}, analysis_time=#{analysisTime} WHERE draft_id=#{draftId}
